message:
test(syscall): pidfd_open invalid pid + flags host-parity pins (bd-11sh, bd-3srp)

bd-11sh adds pidfd_open_invalid_pid_sets_einval_like_host — host glibc
returns EINVAL for pidfd_open(-1, 0) because a negative pid fails
validation before any process-lookup step.

bd-3srp documents that pidfd_open_current_pid_invalid_flags_set_einval_like_host
is already the exact host-parity gate for the bad-flags contract
(pidfd_open(getpid(), 1) → EINVAL).

Verification (rch + CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_frankenlibc_cc):
  cargo test -p frankenlibc-abi --test stdlib_abi_test pidfd_open
                                                     3 passed
  cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-abi --tests -- -D warnings  clean
  cargo fmt --check                                 clean
  ubs                                                exit 0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
